general.name: General Enquiry
general.info: For reaching out and saying hello, and any questions you might have

accessibility.name: Accessibility Enquiry
accessibility.info: We strive to ensure that our performance and rehearsal spaces are as accessible as possible. Feel free to reach out for more information

collaborate.name: Collaboration Proposal
collaborate.info: Interested in working with us? We're always keen to hear from performers, creatives, theatre companies, and organisations who share our passion for storytelling. We're currently open to collaborations in the London, York, and Manchester areas

hire.name: Hire Request
hire.info: We have a selection of 1920s costumes and props available for hire. Get in touch to discuss availability, pricing, and specific requirements

press.name: Press & Media Enquiry
press.info: For interviews, media requests, promotional materials, photography, or information about upcoming productions, please contact us here

other.name: Other
other.info: Not sure which category your enquiry falls under? Select this option and we'll make sure it reaches the right person
